other_observers: none today; I first found this bird on 10/19/2011
specific_location: Valco Ponds in Pueblo, west of Valco Ponds parking lot.
description: The same bird I saw on 10/19/2011. I saw greenish yellow tanager, with thin wing bar. The overall color was wrong for Summer Tanager and Hepatic Tanager, and lack of two obvious wing bars eliminated Western Tanager. See photo from today and from 10/19/2011.Behaviors: Seen in grape tree.Call: nonePlumage: fall plumage
